name: zadroinc.com
message: Zadro Inc. is a California-based beauty, health, and wellness brand with over 37 years of experience in creating innovative products. Specializing in advanced technology and holding more than 40 patents, the company offers a range of items including makeup mirrors, towel warmers, massagers, and aromatherapy products. Its intended clients include individuals seeking to enhance their daily routines and achieve spa-like comfort at home. With a commitment to quality and customer satisfaction, Zadro Inc. has established itself as a trusted brand in the wellness and beauty industry. Employees: 200 Revenue: $11.9 Million Industry: Retail Phone Number: (714) 892-9200
